usefulness_evaluation.narrative: Structural test with no AI. All 6 phases passed: single-day round-trip (summary + date preserved), multi-day round-trip (3 days with correct summaries, dates, item counts), partial fields (summary-only returns empty date, date-only returns 'Day N' fallback), empty-days truncation to zero items, and full replacement semantics (new 2-day overwrites old 3-day with no stale data). PR #198 day_summary/day_date JSONB metadata threading is fully functional.
